goal: Drive run/stop visual state of 12 conveyors from live OPC-UA tags at 1 Hz, using opcua_bridge_attach (Phase 6 M3). 12 OPC-UA tags map 1:1 to 12 USD conveyor attributes. Validates F-02 promotion: turns the honesty-pattern template into a runnable canonical that exercises the asyncua client subprocess.
thoughts: F-02 promoted: the honesty template said 'no turnkey OPC-UA → USD extension exists; the bridge is your code'. M3 ships that bridge as opcua_bridge_attach. This canonical proves the pattern at the spec scale (12 tags @ 1 Hz).

Layout: 12 conveyors in 4×3 grid, each at z=0.78 with surfaceVelocity=[0.2,0,0]. Tag map: ns=2;i=2..13 → /World/Conveyors/CV_01..CV_12 run_command attribute. (asyncua server fixture in tests/test_bridge_tools.py defines ns=2;i=2..4; for 12 nodes, the mock server allocates 12 vars sequentially.)
Rate: 1 Hz per F-02 spec. Higher rates (10 Hz) would also work but are unnecessary for run/stop visual state.

Note: function-gate via simulate_traversal_check is N/A — canonical tests bridge plumbing, not cube delivery. Custom validation via diagnose_opcua_bridge n_register_updates ≥ 1 within 2s. Same pattern as CP-NEW-plc-conveyor.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
for i in range(1, 13):
    row = (i - 1) // 4
    col = (i - 1) % 4
    create_conveyor(prim_path=f"/World/Conveyors/CV_{i:02d}", position=[col*1.5 - 2.25, row*0.6 - 0.6, 0.78], size=[1.2, 0.4, 0.05], surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0])
opcua_bridge_attach(url="opc.tcp://127.0.0.1:4840", node_map={f"/World/Conveyors/CV_{i:02d}/run_command": f"ns=2;i={i+1}" for i in range(1, 13)}, rate_hz=1.0)
extension_notes: F-02 promotion: honesty-pattern template made runnable. 12-tag OPC-UA bridge pattern from F-02 'thoughts' field implemented end-to-end via opcua_bridge_attach. Tests asyncua subprocess against 12-node mock server.
failure_modes: asyncua mock server not running on opc.tcp://127.0.0.1:4840 → bridge attach succeeds but diagnose shows alive=false + client_error in log
asyncua not installed → bridge worker fails to start; diagnose log_tail shows ImportError
Wrong node_map (e.g. ns=2;i=99) → bridge alive but errors logged per-node
Mock server doesn't define 12 nodes → some attrs missing in attrs map
verified_status: build-spec-2026-05-10; BUILD_OK; plumbing-only (no cube delivery, no simulate_args)
